description_long: This house features a modern, single-story design with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The structure is divided into two main sections, each with distinct interior spaces visible through large windows and open walls. The left section includes a kitchen, dining area, and living room, while the right section appears to house bedrooms and a lounge area. The exterior is predominantly white with some brown and gray accent walls, and the property is bordered by a sidewalk and a street with parked cars. There are green lawn areas at both the front and rear, and the main entryway is accessible from the street. The house is designed for urban living, with easy access to the road and pedestrian pathways.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a clean, rectangular layout, featuring both living and bedroom areas. The exterior is mostly white with brown and gray accents, and the property is adjacent to a street and sidewalk.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rear and side of the house, showing the open living and dining areas, as well as the green backyard and partial street access.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entryway, street, sidewalk, and large windows revealing the kitchen and lounge areas inside.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the bedroom section with multiple beds visible through the windows, as well as the street and sidewalk along the property.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back lawn, the separation between the two main sections of the house, and the driveway leading to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some continuous glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is flush with the street, featuring a simple door, no steps, and minimal overhang, with large windows adjacent to the entrance.
